InfoTooltip: Open the application's website in your default browser\n{0}
SearchTooltip: Press Ctrl-F and type app name to filter application list below. Press Esc to reset the filter
ExportTooltip: Export Selected Elements and copy execution command to clipboard.
TweaksNote:
Note: Hover over items to get a better description. Please be careful as many of these tweaks will heavily modify your system.
Recommended selections are for normal users and if you are unsure do NOT check anything else!
DefaultUpdateDescription:
Default Windows Update Configuration
- No modifications to Windows defaults
- Removes any custom update settings

Note: This resets your Windows Update settings to default out of the box settings. It removes ANY policy or customization that has been done to Windows Update.
SecurityUpdateDescription:
Balanced Security Configuration
- Feature updates delayed by 365 days
- Security updates installed after 4 days

Feature Updates: New features and potential bugs
Security Updates: Critical security patches

Note: This only applies to Pro systems that can use group policy.
DisableUpdateDescription:
!! Not Recommended !!
- Disables ALL Windows Updates
- Increases security risks
- Only use for isolated systems

Warning: Your system will be vulnerable without security updates.
Step1SelectWindows11ISODescription: Browse to your locally saved Windows 11 ISO file. Only official ISOs downloaded from Microsoft are supported.
Step1SelectWindows11ISONote: NOTE: This is only meant for Fresh and New Windows installs.
OfficialISOWarningTitle: !!WARNING!! You must use an official Microsoft ISO
OfficialISOWarningDescription: Download the Windows 11 ISO directly from Microsoft.com. Third-party, pre-modified, or unofficial images are not supported and may produce broken results.
MicrosoftDownloadChoose: On the Microsoft download page, choose:
MicrosoftDownloadOptions:
- Edition  : Windows 11
- Language : your preferred language
- Architecture : 64-bit (x64)
Step2MountVerifyISODescription: Mount the ISO and confirm it contains a valid Windows 11 install.wim before any modifications are made.
InjectCurrentSystemDriversTooltip: Exports all drivers from this machine and injects them into install.wim and boot.wim. Recommended for systems with unsupported NVMe or network controllers.
Step3ModifyInstallWimDescription: The ISO contents will be extracted to a temporary working directory, install.wim will be modified (components removed, tweaks applied), and the result will be repackaged. This process may take several minutes depending on your hardware.
RunWindowsISOModificationAndCreator: Run Windows ISO Modification and Creator
Step4OutputTitle: Step 4 - Output: What would you like to do with the modified image?
CleanResetTooltip: Delete the temporary working directory and reset the interface back to Step 1
WriteDirectlyToUSBDrive: Write Directly to a USB Drive (ERASES DRIVE)
USBWarning:
!! All data on the selected USB drive will be permanently erased !!
Select a removable USB drive below, then click Erase & Write.
ReadyPleaseSelectISO: Ready. Please select a Windows 11 ISO to begin.
PleaseSelectISOFirst: Please select an ISO file first.
Toggle the green highlight for FOSS appl: Toggle the green highlight for FOSS applications
Install or upgrade the selected applicat: Install or upgrade the selected applications
Upgrade all applications to the latest v: Upgrade all applications to the latest version
